ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NATT_Legacy_Option__c, OR(TEXT(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c) = "Quote", AND(TEXT(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c) = "Amendment", ISBLANK(SBQQ__Source__c), NOT(ISBLANK(SBQQ__UpgradedAsset__c)), ISBLANK(SBQQ__PriorQuantity__c)), AND(TEXT(SBQQ__Quote__r.SBQQ__Type__c) = "Amendment", ISBLANK(SBQQ__Source__c), ISBLANK(SBQQ__UpgradedAsset__c))) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not add a legacy option to this quote.
